Process

How it works.

01
Step 01

Brief Me

Share your video idea, niche, and goals. Drop reference links, channel context — anything that helps me understand your audience.

02
Step 02

I Design

I craft high-CTR thumbnail concepts using proven composition principles, bold typography, and visuals tuned for your niche.

03
Step 03

You Review

You review the concepts and share feedback. Revisions are included until every detail feels exactly right.

04
Step 04

You Publish

Receive final PNG and PSD files, upload to YouTube, and watch the click-through rate climb.
